Registry.Name: Identity Mask Registry
Registry.Hint: Internal storage for combat-tracker aliases and reveal states. Managed through the tracker controls; not edited directly.

Editor.Title: Identity Mask
Editor.AliasHint: What players see in the combat tracker while this creature is masked. Maximum 64 characters. Leave empty and save, or press Clear, to remove the mask.
Editor.IdPlayerReadable: Caution: this entire identification record (status, skill, total, DC, roller, timestamp, note) is technically readable by player clients. Recording it never reveals the name — reveal stays a separate manual action.

Warn.GmOnly: Only a GM may change identity masks.
Warn.SaveFailed: Failed to save identity-mask state. See the console for details.
Warn.NoToken: This combatant has no scene token and cannot be masked.
Warn.BadIdentification: Invalid identification data; nothing was saved.
Warn.MigrationMalformed: Identity-mask registry migration excluded {count} malformed entries (see console).
